name: python3-fleep
title: python3-fleep
description:
File format determination library (Python 3)
This package contains a library that determines file format by file signature
(also known as "magic number").
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-fleep because File format determination library (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-fleep as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-fleep with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-fleep --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
